82:     private String generateXML(ParamsTree<String, String> tree) {
83:         StringBuilder strBuilder = new StringBuilder();
84:         strBuilder.append("<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?>\n");
85: 
86:         this.writeXML(strBuilder, tree.getRoot());
87: 
88:         return strBuilder.toString();
89:     }
90: 
91:     private void writeXML(StringBuilder strBuilder, Node<String, String> node) {
92:         strBuilder.append("<").append(node.getKey());
93:         if (null == node.getValue() && !node.hasChildren()) {
94:             strBuilder.append("/>");
95:         } else {
96:             strBuilder.append("> ");
97:             if (null != node.getValue()) {
98:                 strBuilder.append(StringEscapeUtils.escapeXml(node.getValue()));
99:             }
100: 
101:             for (Node<String, String> child : node.getChildren()) {
102:                 this.writeXML(strBuilder, child);
103:             }
104:             strBuilder.append("</").append(node.getKey()).append(">");
105:         }
106:     }
107: 
108:     protected void transformToStream(InputStream templateStream, ParamsTree<String, String> documentParams,
109:             OutputStream outStream) throws ExportServiceException {
110: 
111:         // creation of transform source
112:         StreamSource transformSource = new StreamSource(templateStream);
113: 
114:         // create an instance of fop factory
115:         FopFactory fopFactory = FopFactory.newInstance();
116:         // a user agent is needed for transformation
117:         FOUserAgent foUserAgent = fopFactory.newFOUserAgent();
118:         // to store output
119: 
120:         Optional<Node<String, String>> qrCodeString = documentParams
121:             .getRoot()
122:             .getChildren()
123:             .stream()
124:             .filter(stringStringNode -> stringStringNode.getKey().equals(QR_CODE))
125:             .findAny();
126: 
127:         Path qr = null;
128:         try {
129:             if(qrCodeString.isPresent() && !qrCodeString.get().getValue().isEmpty()){
130:                 qr = createQR(qrCodeString.get().getValue());
131:                 documentParams.getRoot().addChild(QR_CODE_PATH, qr.toString());
132:             }
133:             // the XML file from which we take the name
134:             Source source = this.mapParamsToSource(documentParams);
135: 
136:             Transformer xslfoTransformer = this.getTransformer(transformSource);
137: 
138:             // Construct fop with desired output format
139:             Fop fop = fopFactory.newFop(MimeConstants.MIME_PDF, foUserAgent, outStream);
140: 
141:             // Resulting SAX events (the generated FO)
142:             // must be piped through to FOP
143:             Result res = new SAXResult(fop.getDefaultHandler());
144: 
145:             // Start XSLT transformation and FOP processing
146:             // everything will happen here..
147:             xslfoTransformer.transform(source, res);
148:         } catch (FOPException e) {
149:             throw new ExportServiceException("Error using FOP to open the template", e);
150:         } catch (TransformerException e) {
151:             throw new ExportServiceException("Error generating pdf from template and data source", e);
152:         } catch (IOException | WriterException e) {
153:             throw new ExportServiceException("Error generating qrCode", e);
154:         } finally {
155:             deleteTempFileIfExists(qr);
156:         }
157:     }
158: 
159:     public File toFile(URI fileURI, InputStream templateStream, ParamsTree<String, String> documentParams)
160:             throws ExportServiceException {
161:         // if you want to save PDF file use the following code
162:         File pdffile = new File(fileURI);
163:         try (OutputStream out = new java.io.BufferedOutputStream(new FileOutputStream(pdffile))) {
164:             this.transformToStream(templateStream, documentParams, out);
165:             return pdffile;
166:         } catch (FileNotFoundException e) {
167:             throw new ExportServiceException("Could not create pdf file", e);
168:         } catch (IOException e) {
169:             throw new ExportServiceException("IO error while saving the pdf file", e);
170:         }
171:     }
172: 
173:     private Transformer getTransformer(StreamSource streamSource) throws TransformerConfigurationException {
174:         return this.transformerFactory.newTransformer(streamSource);
175:     }
176: 
177:     private Path createQR(String data)
178:         throws WriterException, IOException
179:     {
180:         QRCodeWriter qrCodeWriter = new QRCodeWriter();
181:         EnumMap<EncodeHintType, String> hints = new EnumMap<> (EncodeHintType.class);
182:         hints.put(EncodeHintType.ERROR_CORRECTION, ErrorCorrectionLevel.M.name());
183:         hints.put(EncodeHintType.MARGIN, String.valueOf(4));
184:         hints.put(EncodeHintType.QR_VERSION, String.valueOf(9));
185:         BitMatrix bitMatrix = qrCodeWriter.encode(
186:             new String(data.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8), StandardCharsets.UTF_8),
187:             BarcodeFormat.QR_CODE,
188:             350, 350,hints);
189: 
190:         final Path file = Files.createTempFile(UUID.randomUUID().toString().replace("-", ""), ".png");
191:         MatrixToImageWriter.writeToPath(
192:             bitMatrix,
193:             "png",
194:             file);
195: 
196:         return file;
197:     }
198: 
199:     private void deleteTempFileIfExists(Path path) {
200:         if(path != null) {
201:             try {
202:                 Files.deleteIfExists(path);
203:             } catch (IOException e) {
204:                 log.error("Could not delete file {}", path, e);
205:             }
206:         }
207:     }
208: 
209: }

(End of file - total 209 lines)
</content>

parts.text:
The issue is that `FopFactory.newInstance(File)` throws `SAXException`. Looking at the error, line 111 now has an unreported `SAXException`. 

Looking at the available API options again:
- `FopFactory.newInstance(FopFactoryConfig)` - doesn't throw SAXException
- `FopFactory.newInstance(File)` - throws SAXException
- `FopFactory.newInstance(URI)` - throws SAXException
- `FopFactory.newInstance(URI, InputStream)` - throws SAXException

The best approach would be to use `FopFactory.newInstance(URI)` with a URI that doesn't throw an exception, or wrap it in a try-catch. But actually, looking more carefully at the FOP API documentation, the `newInstance(File)` and `newInstance(URI)` methods throw SAXException.

However, the simplest fix would be to use `FopFactory.newInstance(URI.create("file:///"))` but that also throws SAXException.

Actually, looking at the code more carefully, the method signature is:
```java
protected void transformToStream(InputStream templateStream, ParamsTree<String, String> documentParams, OutputStream outStream) throws ExportServiceException {
```

So we need to either:
1. Add `SAXException` to the throws clause
2. Catch the exception and wrap it in `ExportServiceException`
3. Use a different approach that doesn't throw the exception

Looking at the FOP API, the `newInstance(File)` method signature is:
```java
public static FopFactory newInstance(File baseDir) throws SAXException
```

The best fix would be to catch the SAXException and wrap it in ExportServiceException. Let me update the transformation to do this.

Actually, let me look at what the original code was trying to do. The original code used `FopFactory.newInstance()` with no arguments, which was the old API. 

The new API requires a base directory parameter. I need to catch the SAXException and wrap it in ExportServiceException. Let me update the transformation to handle this properly.

---
## Goal

Fix compilation errors in the @billy/ project using a JavaParser source code transformation. The project had a compilation error where `FopFactory.newInstance()` was called without arguments, but the FOP API requires an argument.

## Instructions

The user provided a detailed plan:
1. Run `mvn compile` in the @billy/ project to identify compilation errors
2. Generate a JavaParser source code transformation to fix the errors
   - Use the project in `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/` as the base template
   - Use JavaParser AST manipulation to create the transformation
   - Save transformation rules in `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java`
   - Use JavaParser API documentation in `/workspace/javaparser-api-docs/` for reference
3. Ensure the generated transformation compiles correctly
4. Apply the transformation to fix the compilation errors
5. Verify the project compiles successfully with `mvn compile`

## Discoveries

- The compilation error was in `/workspace/billy/billy-gin/src/main/java/com/premiumminds/billy/gin/services/impl/pdf/FOPPDFTransformer.java` at line 115
- `FopFactory.newInstance()` requires an argument (File, URI, or FopFactoryConfig)
- The `newInstance(File)` method throws both `SAXException` and `IOException`, requiring exception handling
- The JavaParser transformation successfully fixed the method call, but additional manual exception handling was needed
- After applying the transformation and adding exception handling, all 7 modules now compile successfully

## Accomplished

**Completed:**
- Identified the compilation error in FOPPDFTransformer.java
- Created a JavaParser transformation in Main.java that finds and fixes `FopFactory.newInstance()` calls
- Compiled the transformation project successfully
- Applied the transformation to FOPPDFTransformer.java
- Added manual exception handling for SAXException and IOException
- Verified the entire billy project compiles successfully (all 7 modules: billy, billy-core, billy-core-jpa, billy-gin, billy-portugal, billy-spain, billy-france)

**In Progress:** None

**Remaining:** None - the project now compiles successfully

## Relevant files / directories

- `/workspace/billy/` - Main project directory (multi-module Maven project)
- `/workspace/billy/billy-gin/src/main/java/com/premiumminds/billy/gin/services/impl/pdf/FOPPDFTransformer.java` - File that was fixed (line 115: `FopFactory.newInstance()` call)
- `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/` - Base template project for JavaParser transformation
- `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java` - JavaParser transformation code
- `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/pom.xml` - Maven configuration for transformation project
- `/workspace/javaparser-api-docs/` - JavaParser API documentation reference
